41.reason: // Error: loop should run from 0 to i (inclusive), but i is the index of last valid element; however, due to input logic, i is not incremented after last term, so this actually includes one extra invalid term.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  // Error: loop should run from 0 to i (inclusive), but i was incremented only after reading non-last terms; last term index is i, so total terms = i+1. However, the real issue is that the first while loop doesn't increment i after reading the last term (when c=='\n'), so valid indices are 0..i, which is correct. But second loop same logic. However, the bigger issue is in ret1 size and merging logic.
